# Regression Models for Trend and Seasonality {trend-seasonality}

```{r trend-seasonality-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/trend-seasonality-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/trend-seasonality/"
)
```

```{r child-trend-seasonality, child="../lecture-content/33-trend-seasonality.Rmd"}
```
